003.title: Worktree not cleaned up when merge/PR flow fails mid-way
003.failure_reason:
PR merge failed: X Pull request kfwuu/grindbot#20 is not mergeable: the merge commit cannot be cleanly created.
To have the pull request merged after all the requirements have been met, add the `--auto` flag.
Run the following to resolve the merge conflicts locally:
  gh pr checkout 20 && git fetch origin master && git merge origin/master

004.title: API key loaded from ~/.env with no file permission check
004.failure_reason:
PR merge failed: X Pull request kfwuu/grindbot#21 is not mergeable: the merge commit cannot be cleanly created.
To have the pull request merged after all the requirements have been met, add the `--auto` flag.
Run the following to resolve the merge conflicts locally:
  gh pr checkout 21 && git fetch origin master && git merge origin/master
